v1_boundary: UK Peppol sandbox test only. This tests Peppol-style invoice readiness through a sandbox provider. It does not prove final UK 2029 statutory compliance.
v1_boundary_warning: UK Peppol sandbox test only. This tests Peppol-style invoice readiness through a sandbox provider. It does not prove final UK 2029 statutory compliance.
legal_regime_summary: The UK pack is a 2029 Peppol roadmap pack. It records announced direction and supports a disabled-by-default Storecove sandbox readiness scaffold only; it does not implement final UK statutory compliance.
scope: UK mandatory e-invoicing is planned for 2029.
Detailed UK technical standards are still pending.
This app supports only a sandbox Peppol readiness test for UK at this stage.
mandatory_format: Peppol has been announced as the UK's core interoperability network.
Final UK technical standards, profiles and implementation artefacts are not yet configured in this app.
No UK production e-invoice output is generated in V1.
transmission_or_clearance_model: The UK is expected to follow a decentralised Peppol-style exchange model.
The UK roadmap pack does not model a Saudi-style tax authority clearance flow.
Storecove integration in Milestone 5A is sandbox-readiness only and disabled unless explicitly configured.
qr_signature_requirements: No UK QR requirement is configured for this roadmap pack.
No UK production signing, statutory approval or real-time reporting requirement is implemented.
retention_or_audit_notes: Evidence must state that any UK Storecove flow is sandbox-only and does not prove final UK 2029 compliance.
Evidence must not contain Storecove API keys or secrets.
Official validation remains not configured until UK artefacts and real validator outputs are available.
v1_app_capability: UK workbook upload, canonical invoice JSON construction and local validation scaffold are available.
Storecove sandbox readiness is available only when sandbox credentials are configured.
No UK production generation, Peppol transmission, HMRC submission, statutory compliance proof or live acceptance is available.

official_sources.label: Open items and deferred country packs

boundary_highlights: No final UK 2029 statutory compliance claim.
No production Peppol transmission or HMRC submission.
